personal.name: Arpan Chatterjee
personal.summary: Final year Computer Science student, with keen interest in Deep Learning, and System Design. Passionate about applying these knowledge to solve complex, real-world problems.

highlights: Developed a responsive web application using React.js and TailwindCSS, improving user engagement.
Collaborated virtually to implement a REST API using Node and Express, integrating JWT-based authentication.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: SEO optimised personal portfolio website built with Next.js, featuring dynamic content rendering and smooth scrolling animations using Lenis.

projects.title: Email Spam Classification
projects.description: Trained a Multinomial Naive Bayes ML model to predict spam. Deployed the interface using Streamlit.

projects.title: Real-time Object Detection
projects.description: (Worked as part time) Fine-tuned YOLOv8 neural network architectures for high-speed object detection and tracking.

projects.title: Hostel Booking Mobile Application
projects.description: Developed a native Android application featuring role-based authentication for students and authorities, complete with dynamic UI components and real-time booking notifications.

projects.title: Blog Web Application
projects.description: Engineered a PHP-based platform utilizing Nginx as a reverse-proxy server, featuring article sharing, liking mechanisms, and dynamic user routing.

hobbies.name: Listening Sad Songs
hobbies.description: At night when the world is quiet and away from this noise, I love to loose myself in sad songs....connects with my emotions.

hobbies.name: Dark Tourism
hobbies.description: Exploring sites of historical significance, particularly those with dark or tragic histories. There I try time travelling to the past and imagining the stories that unfolded there.

hobbies.name: Adventure
hobbies.description: Exploring new places mainly places that are close to nature like Forests.
